content-desc: Access the menu at anytime by tapping the menu icon in the top left corner.

children.text: Access the menu at anytime by tapping the menu icon in the top left corner.
content-desc: Access the menu at anytime by tapping the menu icon in the top left corner.
Tap the book name in the title bar to access the quick picker. From here you can quickly drill down to the exact verse you wish to access in the Bible.

children.text: Tap the book name in the title bar to access the quick picker. From here you can quickly drill down to the exact verse you wish to access in the Bible.
content-desc: Tap the book name in the title bar to access the quick picker. From here you can quickly drill down to the exact verse you wish to access in the Bible.
When pressing the play button at the bottom of the screen you will start the NIV Live Audio. Each verse will highlight as the audio plays in sync, verse by verse.
